title: daphne alba
intro: Daphne alba, also known as the winter daphne, is a flowering plant native to Europe, western Asia, and North Africa, belonging to the family Thymelaeaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health issues, including skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Daphne alba include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Daphne alba is traditionally prepared as a tincture, infusion, or ointment, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
intro_study: According to "Fitoterapia", Daphne alba benefits include its ability to exhibit antibacterial, antifungal, antioxidant, analgesic, anti-inflammatory, cytotoxic, antiviral, abortive and haemostatic effects.
